name: Roasted Winter Vegetables with Basil Oil
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pounds red potatoes, cut into 1-inch pieces
1/2 pound carrots, peeled and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine chicken broth, basil oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the diced red potatoes, turnip, parsnip, carrots, and chopped onions to the bowl.
4. Toss everything well until the vegetables are evenly coated with the mixture.
5. Pour the mixture into a shallow roasting pan that has been sprayed with cooking spray.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 400°F for 35 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender. Stir occasionally during baking.
